programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: The Sneaky Ways Of A Woman Who Is Both Beautiful And Smart
programme.desc: Dr. Janet Craig, rebuffed as a physician by the local males, sets out to win them over as a woman—and a good cook.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: The Strange Case Of Joseph P. Carson
programme.desc: In an attempt to get rid of lady Dr. Craig, Uncle Joe fakes an illness that becomes real.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro continues his fantasy of being a double naught spy by getting an office at the bank. When two bank robbers arrive, who are interested in that office because it is above the vault, they make Jethro believe they are from London headquarters.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Shorty and Jethro stay out all night, not to Granny's approval, Shorty is forced to chop wood in the early morning and do other chores the rest of the day so he will want to go home.

programme.title: Popeye and Pals
programme.sub-title: Happy Birthdaze, Penny Antics, The Marry-go-round
programme.desc: "In order to prevent fellow sailor Shorty's suicide attempts, Popeye invites him to a birthday party at Olive's home, but Shorty's clumsiness causes lots of mishaps., Popeye and Bluto run competing penny arcades., Popeye wants to propose to Olive, but can't work up the nerve. His fellow sailor, Shorty, helps him."

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.sub-title: The Little Orphan, Bah Wilderness, Vanishing Duck
programme.desc: "An orphan mouse joins Tom and Jerry for Thanksgiving Dinner., Barney Bear decides to spend a quiet night in the wild during a camping trip but, unfortunately for him, there are plenty of nocturnal animals that do their best to deny him any sleep. , Jerry and his singing duck friend discover the delights of vanishing cream while Tom suffers because of it."

programme.title: The Woody Woodpecker Show
programme.sub-title: Banquet Busters, Chilly And The Woodchopper, Coming Out Party, Wild And Woody, Corny Concerto, Moochin Pooch, The Loan Stranger
programme.desc: "Woody and Andy are true starving musicians who agree to a gig in a fancy mansion in the hopes of nabbing some food., Chilly stows away in a woodchopper's bag. When Chilly arrives at Smedley's Rest Home, Smedley attempts to get rid of the stowaway., Inspector Willoughby repeatedly foils Crash's attempts to escape Sing Song prison., Sheriff Woody attempts to capture bandit Buzz Buzzard and blows him up and sends him to hell in the process., Doc and Champ inadvertently develop a famous "act" in which Doc hits Champ's foot with a mallet., Charlie offers to babysit his boss' dog while he's out of town., A wolf in loan officer's clothing pursues Woody after he forgets to repay a loan."

programme.title: Bugs Bunny and Friends
programme.sub-title: Oily Hare, Baby Bottleneck, Wabbit Twouble, From A To Z-z-z-z, Horton Hatches The Egg, Show Biz Bugs
programme.desc: "A Texas oilman and his assistant, Maverick, try everything to get Bugs to move his hole from their oil fields. , A post-war baby-boom era overworks the stork, and faulty deliveries are made. Daffy Duck and Porky Pig are then hired as assistants but this leads to more problems than good. , While camping, Elmer Fudd runs into the menacing Bugs Bunny. , Another episode with Ralph Phillips and all his daydreaming fantasies. He fights math problems on the chalkboard, becomes part of the pony express escaping Indians and flies like a bird., A cartoon based on Dr. Seuss, about Horton, the elephant who promised he'd babysit a bird's eggs. , Daffy is jealous that Bugs' show is more popular than his own. "

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Big Blackmail
programme.desc: While President Grant attends an event at the German Consulate, Baron Hinterstoisser invites him to a special reception, explaining he has something interesting for the president to see. Suspicious, agent James West retrieves the mysterious box the Baron refers to and finds a kinetoscope of a fake depiction of President Grant signing a secret agreement with the unscrupulous government of another nation. If the film is shown for the heads of other countries, Grant will suffer terrible indignation and upset international relations. If the film is not replaced, however, the Baron will accuse the U.S. of stealing on consulate soil, a far greater crime. Agent Artemus Gordon decides that the only alternative is to make a duplicate kinetoscope - with some changes - and return it to the consulate before it is discovered missing. West and Gordon finish just as the president arrives. The Baron announces that he has proof of President Grant's connection with the corrupt foreigh officials. But as the film is shown before an attentive crowd, it's not quite what Hinterstoisser expects.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A boy hurt in a crippling accident and his domineering mother meet a runaway boy, who she feels is making her son do things outside his capabilities. Another accident reveals something unexpected because it may pit two friends against each other.

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: When he accuses some gypsy workers of stealing his brandy and injures one of them in a fight, Nick is volunteered by his brothers to escort the other gypsies and their dowry wagon to a wedding. On the way there, he becomes smitten with the bride-to-be and learns some lessons about intolerance.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Doc tries to keep an alcoholic off the bottle.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben comes to the aid of Amy Wilder, an eccentric animal lover whose mental competency is questioned when a neighbor declares an interest in her land for mining.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his friend become trapped in an old mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark attempt to reform a con man.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: The race is on when a disgruntled Rowdy signs as trail boss for another drive and pulls all the stops to beat Favor's herd to market.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: A rancher blames Paladin when a practical joke goes awry and his wife is crippled in a riding accident.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Against better judgment, Josh serves as guide for a dandified East Coast gun salesman who comes west to retrieve and replace a defective gun he sold to notorious outlaw Curly Bill Brocius.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Mutts To You, Wee Wee Monsieur, I Can Hardly Wait, Wham Bam Slam, Merry Mix Up, Out West
programme.desc: "When the stooges find a baby they take it back to their dog laundry business, but wind up in the dog house when they are accused of kidnapping the baby. , Paris is for loveres, and for the Three Stooges, as struggling artists who paint themselves into a cornerwhenthey try to rescue a military captain from kidnappers. , The wild west will never be the same again! The Stooges turn a frontier upside down in this wild, wild comedy gem! , The Stooges are defense workers who have trouble getting to sleep when Curly gets a toothache. Moe and Larry try various ways to remove the offending tooth, but nothing works so they take Curly to the dentist. While Moe gets in the chair to show Curly how easy it's going to be, the dentist enters and pulls Moe's tooth by mistake. Curly then wakes up and realizes its all been a dream and a punch to the mouth from Moe dislodges the tooth. , Shemp is a sick man with a bad case of nerves. The stooge's friend Claude, a self-taught healer, tries to cure Shemp with various home- made remedies. When nothing seems to work, Claude suggests they buy his old lemon of a car so they can take Shemp on a trip to the country. The car won't start, and the trip never gets off the ground, but not to worry, Shemp is cured by all the excitement. , The Stooges appear in triplicate as three sets of triplets who were separated a long time ago. Their reunion causes confusion and troubles for various wives and sweethearts, but it all works out in the end. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "Volcanic activity frees giant scorpions from the earth who wreak havoc in the rural countryside and eventually threaten Mexico City."

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: After Catwoman steals one of two priceless golden cat statuettes, Batman and Robin race to protect the other. However, Catwoman captures Boy Wonder and sics a tiger on Batman.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.sub-title: What Are Little Girls Made Of?
programme.desc: Nurse Christine Chapel is reunited with her old fiancé on Exo III, but the scientist has plans for Captain Kirk and the Federation.

programme.title: Adventures of Superman
programme.desc: Lois writes an article about the discovery of an ancient necklace that is said to protect its wearer from harm. A gangster reads the article and kidnaps Lois.

programme.title: Adventures of Superman
programme.desc: Lois and Jimmy visit a rodeo. Jimmy gets on the bad side of a gunfighter who warns him to leave town by sundown.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: Luminous aliens capture Dr. Smith with the plan to replace their burnt out computer with his brain. Smith bargains with them, and they attempt to use Will's brain instead.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: The flying sub is attacked by a ghostly, underwater pirate ship—which fires a live bombardment.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: The castaways agree to help a professor fix his robot creation in exchange for help returning to Earth. But the professor proves to be less than trustworthy.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: In 1861, Tony and Doug are involved in a plot to assassinate President-elect Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Aliens plot to make a new resilient race.

programme.title: The Life and Times of Grizzly Adams
programme.desc: "Mad-Jack disappears down a river on a raft. Adams later finds some of his belongings. Thinking he may have perished,it causes him to reflect back on the time he first met the mountain man. Will James Capen Adams bid farewell to his friend?"

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Oddities of animal motion include mammals that fly, birds that climb with their shoulders, lizards that dive and snakes that travel sideways."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "A horseback safari into the wilds of Rhodesia where Marlin Perkins and Jim Fowler explore the vast grasslands, rivers and forests and observe an amazing variety of rare animals. In this episode, the forming waters swirl around tons of struggling hippo in a dangerous project to tranquilize and capture one of the largest members of the wild kingdom."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Man loves speed and this episode answers some of the most pertinent inquiries as to what animals hold the records."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "In the wild kingdom each animal owns a territory…and one animal rules every habitat. A visit to each domain reveals why each is called a Monarch of the Wild."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Of all the behemoths that once roamed the earth, only the elephant is left for us to marvel about. And marvel we should for here’s an animal that weights 10 tons, yet leaves an imprint only a half-inch deep when walking on soft sand…can eat 200 pounds of hay a day, drink 50 gallons of water at one go, grow to be 13 feet tall at the shoulder, yet can use its trunk so delicately it can pick a flower off the ground without crushing it. But many questions about this animal remain unanswered. By literally living with a family of elephants in Bechuanaland, Africa, we observe their fascinating life."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin and Stan are invited to help capture one of the most feared animals on four legs, a livestock marauding grizzly. They plan to use the only capture method suited to the animal and the country – roping the fierce and powerful bear."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: When Cindy's doll, Kitty Karry-All, turns up missing, she accuses Bobby. This leads to a mock trial with Alice as judge to determine Bobby's guilt or innocence. Later, Bobby's kazoo turns up missing and he blames Cindy.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby bets Greg that he can't do twice as many chin-ups as him. Greg is a tad too confident and sees no need to train, a decision that comes back to bite him. Meanwhile, Mike prepares for his high school reunion.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie, Postie and Ralph are forced to go cruising for girls in Howard's DeSoto after Marion dents Richie's car at the supermarket. They find three girls but, later, find their boyfriends—who are members of street gang the Dragons!

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne and Shirley become hospital volunteers, or "candy stripers," and have a hard time as newbie nurses.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mayberry guitarist Jim Lindsey (James Best), a success as a solo artist, returns to a hero's welcome. However, Andy suspects trouble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky asks for a raise, but his boss (Gale Gordon) turns him down, prompting Lucy to prove just how popular a performer he is. Her scheme involves making a lot of bogus reservations at the club on the night that somebody else is playing, then show up in various guises (including Fred in drag) feigning indignation that Ricky's not performing and leave in a huff.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After drawing Alma's name for a school picnic, Wally finds himself meeting her parents and her mother takes an immediate liking to Wally, setting him and Alma up on numerous dates, but then turns around and accuses Wally of monopolizing Alma's time.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver asks his parents if he could ride his new bike to school instead of the bus, and after some hesitating they finally agree to it. However, on the first day, a naive Beaver gets his bike stolen.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny tries to conjure a man for Elly May, but accidentally attracts Miss Jane's man, who is actually a hired escort Mr. Drysdale got for Elly. When the Clampetts find out, they work to get rid of him so Miss Jane can have her man back.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Lance Bradford has started working as vice president at the Commerce Bank, though he really isn’t doing anything helpful. Everyone at the bank, except Drysdale, is excited to get Jet Stream working at the bank. Jethro sees how the girls at the bank react to Lance’s Air Force uniform, so he goes out to get a four-star general uniform. When Lance visits, needing a new account, Jethro tells him he’ll put his whole allowance in the bank if he sets him up with the girls.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: The castaways make a silent movie in the hopes that it will lead to their rescue.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and the Skipper hear a radio broadcast telling of the collapse of the Howell financial empire.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama finally gets the house to herself when everyone goes away for the weekend. But the peace and quiet is far from the paradise she expects.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.sub-title: There's No Place Like… No Place (s5, ep)
programme.desc: Mama accidentally leaves home without her identification, ending up arrested during a rally by the homeless.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.sub-title: Farnsworth's Fling / Three In A Bed / I Remember Helen / Merrill, Melanie & Melanesia / Gopher Farnsworth Smith (part 2) (s5, ep)
programme.desc: The crew is in Australia to work on one of the cruise lines ships based there. And a wealthy man named Fransworth has decided to invite his whole family for a reunion. But in actuality he wants to see who among them he should keep in his will.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee, believing that the jailhouse environment is adversely affecting Opie, forbids the lad to spend time at work with Andy.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "Former Marine Corps Reservist Neil LaSala may have retired from duty, but his devotion to the armed forces continues in his expansive collection of the original, 12-inch G.I. Joe action figure. Neil’s home is a virtual museum of the iconic toy’s early years and rare interim incarnations, and he shares with Lisa some of his most desirable items, including an African American soldier, Joe as a State Trooper complete with motorcycle and accessories, and a complete (and pristine!) run of the super-rare Photobox series. Joining Lisa is Collector’s Call favorite Joel Magee a.k.a “America’s Toy Scout.” Joel appraises Neil’s meticulously curated collection, then offers him a trade for something he ends up already owning, but with an unexpected, Joel Magee twist. And when Lisa learns it's also Neil's birthday, she rises to the occasion with a final, G.I. Joe-themed surprise."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye creates a fake doctor, Captain Jonathan S. Tuttle, to give supplies to the local orphans. Henry wants Tuttle to be officer of the day, so Hawkeye creates a fake personnel file, and all his back pay is given to the orphanage. When General Clayton wants to reward his generosity, Hawkeye is forced to invent a story about Tuttle jumping from a chopper without his parachute!

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Trapper operate on a famous Colonel - after discovering that he is particularly ruthless about sacrificing his men, they come up with a scheme to get him sent back to the states with a little unwitting help from Frank, Margaret, and a drunk Henry.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Edith develops laryngitis on the eve of her singing debut at Stephanie's PTA recital, Archie steps in to understudy the duet.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Edith invites butcher Klemmer and his new sweetheart, a Russian who is the spitting image of Edith, she notices that Klemmer might have the hots for Edith and not for her.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith and Archie rush Stephanie to the hospital for an emergency appendectomy on the eve of her 10th birthday. Luckily, the surgery goes perfectly, so they celebrate both Stephanie's birthday and the success of her operation.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie and Edith are shocked when they discover that Stephanie has been stealing some of her favorite teacher's (and the Bunkers') belongings. But Stephanie admits that she stole these things so that when she returns to her dad's, she'll have something to remember them by.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Bernadette Peters And Donald O'connor
programme.desc: "Guests Bernadette Peters and Donald O'Connor. Originally aired on 10/26/70."

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Nancy Wilson And Nanette Fabray
programme.desc: "Guests Nancy Wilson and Nanette Fabray. Originally aired on 01/12/70."

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob and Laura recall a rough trip to Mexico where a divorce is only $10.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: A gag on live TV leaves Sally with many suitors.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph feeds his boss dog food, thinking that it is an appetizer that Alice made.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut arrives back on Earth, noticing several differences.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A woman hears voices in her car when she arrives in Hong Kong to join her husband.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps must stop Charles Peck from using violence, created by professional provocateur Billy Walsh, to elevate his puppet, Mayor Steven Tallman, to the governorship. Dana is a provocateur herself, arrested by Barney, the current governor's representative.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble arrives in a small town where women are being murdered by an unknown serial killer and a vigilante mob mistakes Kimble (a stranger in town) of being the killer. Kimble hides out with a mentally retarded young woman named Joanne Mercer, a 'moon chil

programme.title: Harry O
programme.desc: "Harry Orwell is framed for murder and must break out of jail to prove his innocence."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to get citizens to take part in a crime-prevention campaign.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A businessman's war against drug addiction results in a new group whose motto is "freaking out isn't in."

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: There's a new dispatcher on today's day watch, and while Reed can't stand her voice, Malloy sees the situation much differently. On patrol, they search for a hit and run driver who left a small girl in serious condition, investigate a break-in at a synagogue, deal with a drunk woman who is searching for her daughter and become part of a SWAT team attempting to neutralize a sniper terrorizing the movie studio from which he was just fired.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed has full faith that an Explorer Scout volunteering at the station can repair his television set in time to watch 'King Kong,' but Malloy thinks he's crazy for letting a teenager work on expensive electronics. On today's patrol, they engage in a high-speed chase with a teenager on a modified dirt bike, investigate a report of a woman who may have buried her husband in their backyard, search for a female bank robber, deal with a group of women illegally protesting outside a supermarket and respond to a call of a robbery in progress at a coffee shop.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony get their summer bods ready with the help of a few guests."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally asks out a rich girl who drops hints that she would like an orchid for her corsage. Wally quickly discovers that getting one is going to be more difficult then he originally thought.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward's cherished autographed baseball becomes the object that Larry and Beaver just can't keep their hands off of. They decide to play catch with it and it ends up getting run over by a truck.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Nervous Accomplice
programme.desc: Sybil Granger hires Mason to help her buy stock in her estranged husband's oil company on the sly. By this, Sybil hopes to force her husband's latest girlfriend, Roxy Howard, out of the company and his life altogether.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire tells Matlock that he wouldn't be able to solve the perfect murder if it were handed to him on a silver platter. To prove his point, he kills Matlock's friend and successfully frames another man for the crime.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Lonnie must protect his Aunt Cordelia when her cherished friendship with Ches Collins angers one of his cousins.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John and Ben again come to blows about work at the mill.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A woman tries to make her boyfriend jealous when she's had enough of his attitude.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: It seems as though everyone wants a piece of a ranch hand who makes a gold strike—including a beautiful woman who may have ulterior motives.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas encourages a drunken artist charged with murder to use his talents to identify the true killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark try to persuade a persecuted young mute to return stolen money.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "The wagon train runs into their old pal Swift Cloud who's on his way back to his Native American village after studying medicine in China. However, the aspiring physician faces resentment from both whites and his own people."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The station becomes aware of the Battalion Chief's impending inspection. A wife is convinced that her husband's heart transplant means he no longer loves her. Paramedics aid a parachutist snagged on a radio tower. Dr. Brackett treats a veterinarian. An accident victim goes into shock.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank throws his back out while spending the evening with Margaret, and ends up in traction. He promptly applies for the Purple Heart, having been 'technically' wounded at a frontline unit. Tommy Gillis, an old friend of Hawkeye's, is writing a book about the war, and pays him a visit.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Once again, Hawkeye writes home to his father, telling him of the latest gossip: the camp gets a new surgeon, who turns out to be a fake; Hawkeye bets he can walk into the mess tent naked for lunch and no one will notice; and Radar cheats on his final exam.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The camp suffers from the severe cold, except for Hawkeye who has received some long johns from his father. They get passed around from person to person as a gift, a gambling stake, a trade, a bribe, stolen and given up to Father Mulcahy, who ends up giving them away.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The camp tunes into the Army/Navy football game, only to be shelled and have an unexploded bomb land in the middle of the compound. They ring around trying to identify the bomb, and the camp prepares for the worst. Hawkeye and Trapper are left the task of following instructions to disarm the bomb.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A schoolboy bully makes life miserable for seven-year-old Opie.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney believes that Andy is grooming a new man to replace him as deputy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to plough the front lawn of the mansion to grow vegetables.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph's advice to a lodge brother on how to be head of the household has his wife (Alice's sister) in tears.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must prevent the Germans from getting ahold of a secret device that was aboard a plane shot down near camp.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must get a defecting field marshal to England, whom Hochstetter has followed to Stalag 13.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martians give Luther Dingle the strength of 300 men.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Witless Witness
programme.desc: A judge is accused of murdering a government witness who planned to expose him as a crook.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday's apartment party provides insight into the nature of an officer's private life.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A lawyer decides to murder one of his clients.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A producer is surprised when an actor announces his retirement plans.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: When a Little League coach goes missing, Mannix investigates and soon discovers that the man went into hiding after a mobster made an attempt on his life.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: When a plane carrying three million in negotiable securities vanishes, the insurance carrier hires Cannon to find out what happened to it.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby comes to suspect that the wrong man was convicted in an 11-year-old kidnapping case.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Martin Milner and Kent McCord appear as Officers Malloy and Reed to portray the policeman's role in society.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A conference provokes old-line policemen to reassess their attitudes, particularly toward minority groups.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While Reed is having his shoes fixed at the repair shop, the squeakiness of his replacement shoes is driving Malloy crazy. On patrol, they deal with a deranged homeowner destroying his own possessions, stop a cargo van whose driver misunderstands the meaning of double jeopardy, search for a young boy hiding in an industrial building about to be demolished and create a hostage situation after shooting a bank robber.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While responding to a baseless complaint against an elderly artist, Malloy decides to buy a random painting out of pity and makes Reed envious. Meanwhile, they question a man attempting to break into a gumball machine while his son looks on, get a big surprise after tracking down a suspected peeping tom, deal with a man who comes up with a creative way to avoid having his furniture repossessed and engage in a game of cat-and-mouse inside the Los Angeles Coliseum with a former football player turned suspected robber.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony trek Montana!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver wants a pet and Ward and June object to his latest one, a mouse. They tell him they can have a sensible pet, so when Beaver and Larry see an ad at the market giving away a free monkey, Beaver jumps at the chance and Ward and June find their house the new home for Stanley, the Monkey.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver and Larry find a wallet that contains $89 while on their way to the grocery store to pick up some groceries for June. Surprisingly, Beaver and Larry decide to turn it in at the police station and Beaver finds himself waiting an agonizing week to see if he can keep the money.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Drowning Duck
programme.desc: Donald Briggs is an unscrupulous private investigator hired by Clyde Waters to uncover information about Marv Adams, his daughter's fiance. Briggs learns that Marv Adams' father was Ben Devereaux, who was convicted of murder 18 years ago.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock agrees to defend psychiatrist Lucas Forbes when he's arrested for killing the husband of one of his patients with whom he was reportedly having an affair. Matlock soon realizes that the patient in question has a host of deep-rooted psychiatric problems.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil accepts a position at a prominent law firm. But as a former police officer he feels conflicting emotions when he realizes that one of their clients is guilty of murder.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy sent his novel to a publisher and does not hear anything.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt is stalked by a hired killer.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A woman walks out of her wedding with the intention of marrying another man—Ben Cartwright.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A lively old lady arrives in town hot on the trail of a notorious bandit—and the reward money for capturing him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A doctor seeks revenge on the man he blames for ruining his practice.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Luke Grant is found wandering the desert with one wish on his mind—kill me! Turned over to the wagon train by some friendly Chiracawa indians, they slowly discover his identity and learn there are Apaches on the warpath and nearby.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A hard-nosed female trainee is assigned to Roy and John. Freeway construction threatens an old couple's house. A man tries to commit suicide by gas, but then changes his mind. A man suffers a heart attack and the paramedics are unable to revive him. Roy is electrocuted trying to save an invalid at a burning building.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Frank argue over Frank's surgical ability. Hawkeye performs a difficult operation and the patient does not recover as he should. Hawkeye begins to doubt his ability and moves out of The Swamp. He decides to open up his patients again, and discovers a nick in the colon that even Frank admits anyone could have missed.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank's normal drone of verbal abuse upsets Ginger, so Hawkeye puts his arm in a cast while he is asleep. Frank puts in for a transfer, and after Franks tells Margaret he's leaving, she decides to leave as well. As a result, Col. Blake puts both Hawk and Trap on double post-op duty until he finds replacements for Majs. Burns and Houlihan.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: General Clayton calls to say that a ceasefire is to be declared. The camp celebrates, Klinger gives away his dresses and locals start to take pieces of the camp. But Trapper does not believe it.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Captain Kaplan is to be shipped home, but becomes paranoid that something will happen to him before he leaves. He takes the wheel of the jeep to drive to Kimpo himself, but crashes and ends up in plaster.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A stubborn but charming lady speeder makes life difficult for Andy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Frank Myers is about to get evicted by the city council when he discovers an old bond that the city of Mayberry issued 100 years ago. Mayberry now owes him $350,000 and can't pay.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are getting ready for Mrs. Fenwick and Cynthia to come to share a meal with them, hoping to give them a better life than what the Clampetts believe they are leading. Jed and Jethro head to visit the Fenwick house, still thinking the gardener’s place is their house, and after seeing the little building decide to get the Fenwicks to move into the Clampett mansion.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ed sells irons after Ralph's advice got him fired from the sewer. When Ed lies about how much money he's making so that the Kramdens don't feel bad, Ralph considers selling irons, too.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan gets the Germans to look for an allied agent by planting an opened parachute in camp. This gives him the opportunity to get at the briefcase that was handcuffed to a courier.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan gets Klink to open an antiques business selling "rare" cuckoo clocks, a business venture that is actually a ruse enabling the POWs to smuggle information out in the timepieces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a man discovers that his business partner has the ability to control objects with his mind, the pair head to Vegas to win big.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Nebulous Nephew
programme.desc: A scam to swindle elderly relatives and a pang of conscience leads to a murder.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives tackle cases for the department's robbery division.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man plans to cheat an insurance company out of a large amount of money.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A little boy on a train tries desperately to tell someone a secret.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Police Detective Ross Santini begins acting suspiciously after taking custody of drug baron Brastow, starting Mannix on a case of kidnapping and blackmail.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A murderer confined to a psychiatric hospital escapes. He's looking for his wife, whom he believes framed him for murder.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby comes to suspect that the wrong man was convicted in an 11-year-old kidnapping case.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A 91-year-old apartment-house manager gets involved in a murder investigation.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives go to work on several cases connected with the department's business-office division.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: A clumsy elderly woman spills a large bottle of perfume in Malloy and Reed's patrol car, resulting in a most unpleasant work day. Meanwhile, a reported burglar in a church office results in a comical case of mistaken identity, a well-meaning man is accused of kidnapping his granddaughter and a young boy asks for help locating his stolen bicycle.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While on a quiet patrol, Reed decides to spend part of his lunch break doing business at his bank while Malloy waits in the patrol car. Unfortunately, he walks into the clutches of a pair of ruthless robbers who take him hostage.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "When Diver Guy goes missing, Detectives Tank and Clicker are on the case!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver must write a composition about his mother but soon finds himself the only one with a seemingly "boring" mother while Richard, Larry and Judy have colorful mothers. Beaver decides to make his mother colorful, too, even if it means making up things.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver finds himself in a most uncomfortable situation when Fred Rutherford practically plays matchmaker and pairs Beaver up with his daughter, Violet. Fred organizes a picnic and invites the Cleavers, which is where the situation culminates into Beaver getting kissed by Violet.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Sulky Girl
programme.desc: An impetuous niece who demands her trust fund be released comes to Mason for help. But it's her boyfriend who needs defending when he is charged with murdering her controlling uncle.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a former snitch calls Julie to the jailhouse and admits that she had lied about a murder suspect, Julie convinces Matlock to defend the man accused of the crime.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A Rabbi returns to Sparta after many years. Racists vandalize his synagogue and soon after their Torah is stolen. Forbes investigates but the Rabbi refuses to trust Bill because of his inaction while investigating a hate crime many years ago.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A hawk is attacking the Waltons' chickens

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt goes after a band of comancheros that raided a camp and kidnapped a girl.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The widow of a teacher demands immediate punishment of the student she blames for her husband's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas unmasks a killer posing as a door-to-door seed salesman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshal Torrance run into trouble transporting a captured killer back to face trial.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A baby girl sure has a rough start when she arrives on the stage with her dead mother. Plague is what people think killed her and then Charlie Wooster steps in to try to help—and, well, you can imagine where it goes from there.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: John gets ribbed about his cooking. The paramedics go to Catalina to help a diver, where John and a doctor treat the patient in a hyperbaric chamber. Roy and John help a famous chef with a kitchen fire. A youth suffers a serious gunshot wound. The firemen deal with a dust explosion.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Brought on by Frank and Margaret's negative reports, General Clayton assigns a psychiatrist, Captain Hildebrand, to examine the 4077th M*A*S*H unit to see if it should be disbanded. Henry tells them to be on their best behavior, or else they will be split up. But the 4077th soon begins to act in their traditional, insane way.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: An inept North Korean pilot, known as 5 O'Clock Charlie, makes his daily attempt to bomb the ammo dump. Frank puts in a request for an anti-aircraft gun, which is granted when Charlie hits General Clayton's jeep. Frank takes charge of the gun, while Hawkeye and Trapper are determined to prevent him from using it, by getting rid of the ammo dump. Frank misses Charlie and destroys the dump.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar writes the weekly activity report: Hawkeye operates on a wounded prisoner who grabs a scalpel and attacks the doctors. Frank wants Klinger thrown out on a section 8, so Henry calls in a psychiatrist, Major Freedman. Hawkeye is attracted to a new nurse but thinks she is married. Trapper loses a patient who developed complications during the O.R. fracas with the wounded soldier.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: For The Good Of The Outfit
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Trapper want the army to admit responsibility for the accidental bombing of a local village. They fill out a report and Major Stoner arrives to investigate, and leaves with all the evidence. When the story is released it claims that the enemy bombed the village, and the army tries to gag the doctors.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: After a tiff with Thelma Lou, Barney is victimized by a scheming young couple.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A ne'er-do-well vagrant has a bad influence on Opie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is desperate to meet a girl, planning to mail himself to Paris. However, Jed talks him out of it. When the Biddle Bird Watchers come to visit for a recruitment gathering, Granny suggests he tries to date one of those girls, but Jed knows that the female bird lovers aren’t exactly his type—attractive. But Jed sees one girl, Athena, that he knows Jethro will like. And sure enough, he does. Jethro spends the afternoon trying to impress Athena, but she isn’t interested.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: The Kramdens and the Nortons fight a rent increase, though Ralph is the only one who really wants to fight.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Is There A Traitor In The House?
programme.desc: Hogan plans to send information to London by using a German radio propaganda program.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tries to detain a German general at camp for 24 hours to allow the Allies to amass troops. Things get complicated when a Gestapo officer comes in search of the reason for Klink's perfect record.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: A Hundred Yards Over The Rim
programme.desc: In 1847 an American pioneer sets out to find medicine for his dying son—and stumbles into modern-day New Mexico.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Deadly Verdict
programme.desc: Mason loses a case when Janice Barton is convicted of murdering her aunt and subsequently sentenced to death. After the verdict, Mason continues investigating to find the real killer among the old lady's heirs.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Police and Secret Service undertake maximum security for a Presidential visit to Los Angeles.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A couple passing through a small town falls victim to its crooked officials.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A desperate man makes a deal with his defense lawyer in order to get acquitted.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: When his secretary, Peggy, is abducted, Mannix finds a note from her captors. He must track down an FBI undercover agent within 72 hours or she will die.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: The victim of a burglary hires Cannon. He's sure he knows who stole $50,000 from his wall safe and only needs Cannon to prove it. The problem is, the suspect was in jail at the time of the robbery!

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: The heir to a fortune makes trouble for the woman who jilted him.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A pot-detecting pooch joins the police to stop marijuana smuggling.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday's problem: is his temporary partner an aide—or an adversary?

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed volunteers to write a profile on Malloy for the LAPD's magazine to honor his 10th anniversary on the force, but soon discovers he may be in over his head. Out on patrol, an apparent gas station armed robbery gets turned on its head when they question the parties after a long chase, a man goes to extreme lengths to get his neighbor's poodle to stop barking, a woman's plan to get her husband arrested backfires and a liquor store robbery suspect barricades himself inside a house's garage after a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed gets stuck manning the front desk after spraining his wrist, where he must deal with a caller who claims to have planted a bomb at the station, a young man who wants to file a claim of police brutality and an elderly man who walks in with a shotgun. Meanwhile, Malloy is assigned a partner who is a first-day rookie, and they deal with three young children from Oklahoma who are abandoned by their mother, and engage in a high-speed pursuit that ends in a most unexpected way.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony discuss long-lost and forgotten inventions like Roman Concrete and the Antikythera mechanism."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: For an upcoming dance, Wally is ready to wear a grey suit but when Beaver brings his new friend, Richard, over to the house, he accidentally spills oil on it, leaving a big stain. This leads Richard and Beaver to try to bleach the stain out with disastrous results. Beaver finds himself with another problem, when later Eddie discovers what Beaver is hiding from Wally.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "Beaver sends his picture in to a modeling agency and they reply with a letter stating they will place his photo in a modeling directory. Soon after Beaver receives another letter this time asking for $30 and when Beaver ignores it, the company threatens legal action."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Silent Partner
programme.desc: Harry Bright and Chuck Clark were once best friends and business partners, until Margaret entered the picture. Margaret, a young woman on the make, entranced Chuck into marrying her. When Margaret is found shot to death, Harry is arrested.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock agrees to defend a psychic claiming to have had a premonition of a murder before it took place.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Eugene tries to protect a friend who was an unwilling accomplice to a robbery and in doing so endangers his probation -- and his life.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The Waltons find a 12 year old runaway in their barn

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A woman plots her revenge on Matt for killing her husband in a gunfight.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben and a fellow cattleman set out to foil the scheme of a meat packer trying to make them sell their herds at rock bottom prices.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deathbed request from an old friend sends Lucas to a neighboring town in search of the man's long-lost sweetheart.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas thinks he has seen a ghost when a young man, eerily similar to a man he killed in the Civil War, challenges him to a gunfight.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Abigail has lost her driver to the better paying mines. Her new driver says he owns a bank and a pig. The ride west reveals another side of him, one that takes at least the pig to change both heart and mind.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: An elderly woman's stomach problems lead to a family brawl. Roy and John treat a drunk in a hotel with a broken elevator. Doctors treat a boy with meningitis. Paramedics respond to a two-car accident with no victims, treat a man who fell in the bathtub and rescue a child trapped in a burning building.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye has been in non-stop surgery for three straight days without sleep, and the wounded keep coming. He decides to find out who started the war, and sends a telegram to Harry S Truman. After listening to some of Frank's rubbish about the North Koreans wanting better plumbing, he tries to send the officers' latrine to the North Koreans with an offer of peace.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye operates on a five-year-old Korean boy, and Radar can't find his family. Henry plans to send him to the orphanage, and the camp enjoys his company while they can. Trapper decides to adopt him after consulting his wife, and has to rescue him after he wanders into the minefield.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Corporal Walker is being sent home, and he wants to marry his Korean girl so she and their baby can return with him. CID sends Lt Willis to investigate, but when he refuses Hawkeye and Trapper frame him. Hawkeye is upset that a nurse he was pursuing does not approve of the marriage between "a gook" and "one of us."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Majors Houlihan and Burns press charges against Colonel Blake to get him arrested and put Frank in charge. They also put Hawkeye and Trapper under arrest so that they can't help Henry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney are honored for achieving the lowest crime-rate in the country.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy learns a great deal about Thelma Lou's cousin.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is still hoping to marry burlesque dancer Chickadee Laverne, and she is still hoping for a dance engagement from the Clampetts. Chickadee returns to the mansion, making Jethro very happy. However, her plan to show them her new act, Little Red Riding Hood, goes haywire thanks to a meddling raccoon.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Alice is getting the apartment re-decorated for free but Ralph thinks she's two-timing him.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A group of underground operatives that Hogan and his team begin working with is actually a group lead by a Gestapo captain who's set on capturing them.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Klink to get back in shape so he won't be sent to the Russian front.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Thieves put themselves into suspended animation for 100 years after hiding a million dollars worth of gold bars.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Shifty Shoebox
programme.desc: Robbery, embezzlement and a coverup at a trucking company end in the murder of one of the owners.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday clashes with a woman writer gathering research material for an article on policewomen.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man plots to get away from his wife for a while without her knowing.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man stands on the ledge of a hotel while police try to talk to him.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: After one of Mannix's friends takes a hostage and is subsequently shot down, Mannix finds out that the man was involved in criminal activity that may also include a famous United States general.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: After a model ends up dead, the man last seen with her hires Cannon. He insists the girl was alive when he left her, so Cannon starts to dig - and turns up quite a collection of motives.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: The vanishing of boats and their crews may be caused by supernatural forces.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A 15-year-old car thief is given a tour of the jail in an attempt to show him the consequences for choosing crime.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate the delay of death notifications in the state employment department.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy's brand new car gets dinged up when he has to bail out to chase down a purse snatcher, but Sgt. MacDonald promises him his kid brother in Beverly Hills can fix it on the cheap. Out on patrol, he and Reed search for a drunk man accused of randomly shooting arrows, respond to a robbery at a deli that results in tragedy and search for a drug store robbery suspect who gets away after being shot.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed begin today's patrol by responding to a call of a drunken woman threatening the patrons of a bar with a handgun. Afterwards, they search for a group of four carjackers who go on a robbery spree after targeting a man with a cache of guns in his trunk, and investigate the suspicious death of a mentally disabled man.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Toony wants to run his own entertainment joint. But which kind? Bill takes some inspiration from famous hangouts of the past."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "Wally gets a job selling Igloo ice cream and quickly finds himself giving credit to everyone, including Eddie. However, as the day approaches that his money is to be collected, Wally scrambles to get those who owe him money, to pay up."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Assigned to read one more book before the end of the school year, Ward suggests Ivanhoe, and Beaver reads it and takes the ideas of knighthood and chivalry to heart. He begins defending girls and begins charging his friends to make them knights.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Angry Mourner
programme.desc: Carla Adrian is having trouble fending off amorous neighbor Mark Cushing. When another neighbor hears a shot and a woman's scream in Mark Cushing's cabin, it's not long before the police discover Cushing's dead body and arrest Mrs. Belle Adrian.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When the manager of a thoroughbred farm is murdered, her father begs Matlock to represent the mentally handicapped man accused of the crime.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Harriet tries to stop an arrogant developer from destroying an important archeological site.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Jason helps a woman named Fern; she is withdrawn from the world because of a past relationship

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: When a man and his expectant wife are stranded on the prairie, their only hope—a man ostracized by the community—is unwilling to help them.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Smitten with a beautiful actress, Hoss is the prime suspect when her jealous leading man is found murdered.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas agrees to take a job as a federal undercover agent and goes to Wyoming to investigate rumors of sales of arms to renegade indians. His life is endangered by the town drunk, who stumbles onto his true identity.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark stays with Miss Milly, while Lucas is in Wyoming on the trail of a gang illegally selling weapons to the Indians. Mark suffers from loneliness and doubt while his father is away for two months.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Shadrack Bennington has been a cavalier of the open road, not wanting to be tied down until he joins the wagon train, heading for San Francisco and a future even he couldn't anticipate.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: En route to a rescue, Roy and John supposedly sideswipe an elderly crossing guard. A couple on their way to a wedding hits a fire hydrant. A burning camper drives up to the station house. A truck carrying insecticide overturns.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Once more Hawkeye writes home to his father: the doctors operate on a soldier with a grenade shot into his body; Hawkeye and Trapper color the skin of a racist patient, who demanded the right color blood, while he is asleep; Henry gets a movie of his daughter's birthday from home; the officers hold the monthly staff meeting.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A lone sniper has the 4077th pinned down—including Radar and Henry in the shower. The poor boy thinks he's firing on McArthur's headquarters, and a chopper finally comes by and wounds him with gunfire from above, ending the siege. Hawkeye walks out to into the bush to tend to the wounded soldier.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The camp succumbs to the Asian flu, except for Hawkeye and Margaret, who have to do everything themselves. As the others start to recover, Hawkeye falls ill but he still manages to operate when wounded arrive.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Trapper recover from an all night party. Henry gets a barbecue, and Hawkeye puts in a request for an incubator. The Quartermaster turns him down. They locate a Major with three incubators, but he won't let them have one.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Aunt Bee falls for traveling handyman Henry Wheeler, Andy soon learns that Wheeler is not as nice as he appears.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: One of Andy's big-city fishing buddies invites him to join the Esquire Club, an exclusive Raleigh men's organization. Barney also is asked to join but tries a little too hard to fit in.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are preparing for Christmas, but are lacking in one thing: Christmas spirit. Jed thinks it is because they aren’t doing anything special for anyone this Christmas. He thinks they should do something special for Mrs. Drysdale, unaware she is still trying to get rid of them. They try to get jobs to raise money for her gift, so she doesn’t find out.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph tries to hit the high note on a civil service exam as well as his cornet.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to get a trainload of stolen paintings back to London, but things get complicated when Marya uses Schultz to impersonate Reich Marshall Goehring.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Kinchloe fights a German boxing champ, creating a diversion for a heist Hogan is planning.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A talkative man takes a $500,000 offer to keep silent for a year.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Drowsy Mosquito
programme.desc: Mason investigates when the sale of phony gold mines leads to murder.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to get citizens to take part in a crime-prevention campaign.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man witnesses a murder by two gangsters.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A woman commits murder while under hypnosis.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is hired to retrieve compromising negatives showing a retired U.S. general stolen by a spy ring. His mission is to buy the confidential documents—no matter the price.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: When a counterfeiting suspect escapes custody, rumors fly that Jim Farragut, the cop in charge of him, succumbed to either greed or cowardice. Jim's an old friend, so Cannon agrees to find a witness Jim claims can prove that he neither took a bribe nor experienced a failure of courage.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby must find a key witness to a murder hiding in a remote area before hit men do.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of Chester W. Farnsworth
programme.desc: Uncle Joe is convinced that the Shady Rest is haunted by a guest who visited 50 years ago, Chester W. Farnsworth.
